visual_description: The man in a pink plaid shirt bends over while holding a white remote, then looks toward the man in a blue plaid shirt standing near a doorway marked 1232. The man in the blue plaid shirt stands upright and looks down before glancing up at his companion. A framed picture hangs on the wall behind them and a lamp is visible to the side.
